name: Peanut Chewy Bars Using Basic Cookie Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the cookie mix, cocoa, granulated sugar, and eggs. Blend well.
2. Spread the mixture evenly in a greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 8 to 10 minutes or until the mixture is set.
4. Remove from the oven and sprinkle peanut butter chips over the top.
5. Drizzle sweetened condensed milk evenly over the chips.
6. Top with coconut flakes.
7. Return to the oven and bake for an additional 20 to 25 minutes, or until lightly browned on top.
8. Allow to cool in the pan before cutting into bars.
Yield: Makes 24 bars
